content: لَو سَمَحت، مُمكِن شَاي بِ لَبَن وِ تِخَلِّيه سُكَّر زِيَادَة؟
translations: eng:can I please have tea with milk, with extra sugar﹖

transcriptions.arabizi: law samaht, mumkin shaei bi|laban wi tichally|uh sukkar ziyaeda?
